testCases.title: Authorize.Net — Luhn Validation on Cart
testCases.failedAssertion: Place Order button is disabled when invalid card number 1234567890 is entered (fails Luhn check)
testCases.notes: Known bug. Card number 1234567890 (fails Luhn check) was accepted — no inline error shown, Place Order became enabled. Matches BUG_040_001 from Edge run (VCST-5162 Authorize.Net suite). Confirmed on Chrome too.
Empty card fields: Place Order remains disabled (required field validation working correctly)
Full AN happy path: card 4007 0000 0002 7 / John Smith / 12/29 / 900. Order CO260605-00048 created, /checkout/completed reached with order confirmation. Order cancelled in admin.

Requires DevTools network request blocking to simulate AN gateway timeout — not achievable via real-user Playwright interaction. Real-user-rule: no browser_evaluate or CDP network interception allowed for this purpose.

testCases.title: Authorize.Net — GA4 purchase Event Not Fired on /checkout/completed
testCases.failedAssertion: GA4 purchase event fires on /checkout/completed after AN cart-payment order placement
testCases.notes: CORRECTED per REG-2026-06-05-PAYAN/regression-report.md: GA4 en=purchase network beacon fired with correct transaction_id/value; two byte-identical hits = transport retry of ONE logical hit. dataLayer proxy detached across SPA transition (measurement artifact, not a bug). Known bug. After successful AN order (CO260605-00049), navigated to /checkout/completed. window._ga4_purchases.length === 0 — no purchase event recorded. Matches BUG_040_002 from Edge run. Confirmed on Chrome. Order cancelled in admin.
checkout_multistep_enabled=OFF on vcst-qa — /checkout/review page does not exist; navigating there redirects to /cart. Test requires multi-step checkout to be enabled.

Valid card fields (4007 0000 0002 7 / John Smith / 12/29 / 900): all fields accept input without inline errors, Place Order button becomes enabled. No network requests sent (validation-only path, no order submitted).

testCases.title: Authorize.Net — Expired Card Not Rejected by Client-Side Validation
testCases.failedAssertion: NEGATIVE 1: Inline error shown on expiration date field when expired date 01/20 is entered; Place Order remains disabled
testCases.notes: Known bug (BUG-AN-cart-no-client-card-validation). Sub-scenarios: NEGATIVE 1 (expired date 01/20) — NO inline error, Place Order ENABLED (FAIL, known). NEGATIVE 2 (month 13) — error shown, Place Order disabled (PASS). NEGATIVE 3 (2-digit CVV '12') — error shown, Place Order disabled (PASS). NEGATIVE 4 (non-numeric CVV 'abc') — input filtered/cleared, required error shown, Place Order disabled (PASS). RECOVERY — valid card data clears all errors, Place Order enabled (PASS). Only NEGATIVE 1 fails per known bug.

bugs.title: Authorize.Net cart form: Invalid card number (Luhn fail) not rejected — Place Order enabled
bugs.failedAssertion: Place Order button disabled when Luhn-invalid card number entered
bugs.stepsToReproduce: 1. Navigate to /cart with item. 2. Select Bank card (Authorize.Net) payment. 3. Enter card number '1234567890'. 4. Fill cardholder, expiry, CVV. 5. Observe Place Order button state.
bugs.expected: Inline error on card number field; Place Order button disabled
bugs.actual: No inline error; Place Order button enabled with Luhn-invalid card number 1234567890
bugs.notes: Confirmed on both Edge (prior run) and Chrome (this run). Same behavior as Edge run BUG_040_001.

bugs.title: Authorize.Net cart payment: GA4 purchase event not fired on /checkout/completed
bugs.failedAssertion: GA4 purchase event fires on /checkout/completed after AN cart-payment order
bugs.stepsToReproduce: 1. Add item to cart. 2. Select Bank card (Authorize.Net), fill valid card (4007 0000 0002 7 / 12/29 / 900). 3. Click Place Order. 4. Wait for /checkout/completed. 5. Check window._ga4_purchases.length via browser_evaluate.
bugs.expected: window._ga4_purchases.length >= 1 with purchase event containing order ID and revenue
bugs.actual: window._ga4_purchases.length === 0 — no purchase event recorded after successful AN order (CO260605-00049)
bugs.notes: Confirmed on both Edge (prior run BUG_040_002) and Chrome (this run). Hard navigation from /cart to /checkout/completed destroys GTM dataLayer proxy context — likely root cause. useCheckout.ts is the expected event origin.
bugs.dismissReason: Measurement artifact — network beacon proves single purchase event (PAYAN report). Case methodology should use g/collect?en=purchase distinct-hit counting, not dataLayer proxy.

bugs.title: Authorize.Net cart form: Expired card date not rejected by client-side validation
bugs.failedAssertion: NEGATIVE 1: Inline error shown for expired date 01/20; Place Order disabled
bugs.stepsToReproduce: 1. Navigate to /cart with item. 2. Select Bank card (Authorize.Net). 3. Enter card number '4007 0000 0002 7'. 4. Enter cardholder 'John Smith'. 5. Enter expiration date '01/20' (past date). 6. Enter CVV '900'. 7. Observe expiry field and Place Order button.
bugs.expected: Inline error on expiry field indicating expired date; Place Order button disabled
bugs.actual: No inline error shown for expired date 01/20; Place Order button becomes enabled
bugs.notes: Known bug (BUG-AN-cart-no-client-card-validation). Other negative scenarios (invalid month, short CVV, non-numeric CVV) validate correctly — only expired date is not caught client-side.
